description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural brown finish and visible wood grain. The axe head is made of metal, with a broad, single-edged blade that is stained with a vivid red coloration, suggesting either paint or a simulated blood effect. The blade is thick and heavy, with a pronounced wedge shape and a flat poll opposite the cutting edge. The handle is smoothly contoured for grip and ergonomics, tapering slightly towards the end. The mounting of the blade to the handle appears traditional, with the head fitted securely onto the top of the handle. There are no visible brand markings or engravings on the axe.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, red-stained metal blade. The design is rugged and utilitarian, with a realistic wood grain and a striking blade coloration.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the broad, red-stained metal blade.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the top, showing the narrow edge of the blade and the alignment of the handle with the head.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the same curved handle and red-stained blade, with the wood grain and blade thickness visible.
description_view_3: The axe is seen from the bottom, displaying the handle's end and the blade's thickness along its edge.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic grip and oval cross-section; natural wood grain visible.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and a pronounced red-stained cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the top of the wooden handle.
